name: your-blog
description: 墨记 — 一个慢工出细活的技术博客 (React + Express + Prisma + MySQL)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm -C client dev" "pnpm -C server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C client build && pnpm -C server build
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
